headline: Kikoff Appoints Chief Financial Officer and Chief Legal Officer, Deepening Executive Bench Amid Rapid Growth
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 21, 2026--Kikoff announced the appointments of John Kaelle as Chief Financial Officer and Robert Mahnke as Chief Legal Officer.
